en.extract:
The Madagascar partridge (Margaroperdix madagarensis) is a species of bird in the family Phasianidae. It is widespread across  Madagascar (except extreme south). It has been introduced to Réunion and Mauritius.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.

The '''Madagascar partridge''' ('''''Margaroperdix madagarensis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Phasianidae]]. It is widespread across  [[Madagascar]] (except extreme south). It has been introduced to [[Réunion]] and [[Mauritius]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].

zh.extract:
马岛鹑（台湾作馬達加斯加鶉，学名：Margaroperdix madagarensis），是鸡形目雉科的一种鸟类，属于单型的马岛鹑属（学名：Margaroperdix）。


特征
马岛鹑体重约245克，翼长约12.12厘米，喙宽度约8.8毫米，喙厚度约8.9毫米，嘴峰长约21.8毫米，跗蹠长约31.3毫米，尾长约60.8毫米。
马岛鹑是留鸟，栖息在森林，它们是植食性动物。它们分布在马达加斯加；引进留尼汪岛。
